untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit pattern recognition (triangle/inside bars detection, multi-timeframe confirmation, pattern boundary identification) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. Bollinger Bands bandwidth contraction is a proxy for volatility compression, but true geometric pattern detection requires candlestick sequence analysis not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated volatility contraction using bb_bandwidth < threshold as proxy for triangle/inside bar patterns. ATR expansion crossing used to signal breakout volatility confirmation. Exit conditions use bb_middle reversion and large body candlesticks as proxies for pattern re-entry and reversal signals. Parameters min_breakout_distance_atr_multiples, bars_to_confirm_breakout, volatility_expansion_threshold_percentile, and inside_bar_count_minimum remain [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] due to pattern-specific requirements.
